/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -fopenmp -mavx2 CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/activation_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/activations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/basic_maths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/data_structures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/dense.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/higher_maths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/machine_learning_algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/ws_server.cpp.o -o app  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dulshan/boost_1_83_0/bin.v2/libs/system/build/gcc-14/release/threading-multi/visibility-hidden:/home/dulshan/boost_1_83_0/bin.v2/libs/thread/build/gcc-14/release/threading-multi/visibility-hidden /home/dulshan/boost_1_83_0/bin.v2/libs/system/build/gcc-14/release/threading-multi/visibility-hidden/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /home/dulshan/boost_1_83_0/bin.v2/libs/thread/build/gcc-14/release/threading-multi/visibility-hidden/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
